examples: Cleanse me with hyssop, and I will be clean; wash me, and I will be whiter than snow.
I wanted to be certain of my own wisdom by copying Solomon, who had knowledge of hyssop and of tree.
The priest is to take some cedar wood, hyssop and scarlet wool and throw them onto the burning heifer.
Ms. Wong handed the restaurant's receptionist some fragrant anise hyssop.
